name: Roambee Supply Chain & Asset Visibility API
what_it_does: Roambee REST API for IoT-powered supply chain and asset visibility platform. Enables AI agents to track shipment and asset location in real-time via IoT sensors, handle cold chain temperature and humidity monitoring alerts, access shock, vibration, and light exposure event data, retrieve carrier-agnostic multi-modal tracking data, manage geofencing and zone monitoring workflows, handle predictive ETA and delay intelligence, access customs and border crossing event data, retrieve asset utilization and pooling analytics, manage Bee tracker device provisioning and management, and integrate IoT visibility data with ERP, TMS, and quality management systems.
use_cases: Tracking shipments and assets with IoT sensors from supply chain visibility agents
Monitoring cold chain temperature compliance from pharmaceutical logistics agents
Accessing shock and damage event data from cargo quality management agents
Integrating IoT visibility with ERP and TMS from enterprise supply chain agents
not_for: Software-only tracking without IoT sensor hardware investment
Domestic-only shipping without global multi-modal visibility needs
High-volume commodity shipping without asset monitoring value
best_when: A shipper of high-value or sensitive goods (pharmaceuticals, electronics, food) using Roambee IoT trackers wants AI agents to automate cold chain monitoring, condition exception alerting, predictive ETAs, and quality compliance tracking.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL: IoT tracker hardware must be provisioned and attached to shipments — API without tracker devices provides no value. Cold chain automation must trigger human escalation for excursions affecting patient safety or product integrity. Tracker battery life limits long-duration monitoring.

auth.notes: Roambee uses API keys for platform API access. Account-level credentials for shipment, asset, and device management. REST API with developer documentation. Webhooks for condition alert and event notifications. IoT sensor data from Bee tracker devices and third-party integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — IoT tracker hardware plus platform subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-tracker and per-shipment subscription; platform plus hardware
pricing.notes: Santa Clara, California. Founded 2014. IoT-powered supply chain visibility platform. Customers include pharma, electronics, and retail. Hardware Bee trackers for real-time GPS, temperature, humidity, and shock monitoring. Partners with global logistics carriers. Competes with Sensitech and Controlant for cold chain.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; IoT event data throttled

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL: IoT tracker hardware required — API has no value without physical Bee devices on shipments
Cold chain excursion automation must escalate to humans for product quality decisions — patient safety
No public MCP server — API key REST API with developer documentation
Tracker connectivity gaps — GPS and sensor data may have gaps in remote locations or air freight holds
GAMP5 compliance for pharma cold chain — validation documentation required for regulated use
API key authentication only (no OAuth scopes) — all-or-nothing access model requires careful key management
agent_readiness.security_notes: IoT sensor and shipment data. SOC2, GDPR, GAMP5. API key. US/EU data residency. Cold chain product integrity and pharma sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: IoT supply chain and cold chain data. SOC2, GDPR, GAMP5. API key. US/EU data residency. Pharma cold chain and product quality.
